problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
